'''âd-z-k''' ('''kadazak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monoplane|monoplane]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monoplane|monoplane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-z-k
|-
! Lemma
| kadazak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazak|thidazak]] || [[word:jidazak|jidazak]] || [[word:shidazak|shidazak]] || [[word:kidazak|kidazak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazak|thuthudazak]] || [[word:jujudazak|jujudazak]] || [[word:shushudazak|shushudazak]] || [[word:kukudazak|kukudazak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudazak|thudazak]] || [[word:judazak|judazak]] || [[word:shudazak|shudazak]] || [[word:kudazak|kudazak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudazak|thudazak]] || [[word:judazak|judazak]] || [[word:shudazak|shudazak]] || [[word:kudazak|kudazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedazak|thedazak]] || [[word:jedazak|jedazak]] || [[word:shedazak|shedazak]] || [[word:kedazak|kedazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodazak|thothodazak]] || [[word:jojodazak|jojodazak]] || [[word:shoshodazak|shoshodazak]] || [[word:kokodazak|kokodazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodazak|thodazak]] || [[word:jodazak|jodazak]] || [[word:shodazak|shodazak]] || [[word:kodazak|kodazak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazak|thodazak]] || [[word:jodazak|jodazak]] || [[word:shodazak|shodazak]] || [[word:kodazak|kodazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdazak|thĂŠdazak]] || [[word:jĂŠdazak|jĂŠdazak]] || [[word:shĂŠdazak|shĂŠdazak]] || [[word:kĂŠdazak|kĂŠdazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadazak|thathadazak]] || [[word:jajadazak|jajadazak]] || [[word:shashadazak|shashadazak]] || [[word:kakadazak|kakadazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazak|thadazak]] || [[word:jadazak|jadazak]] || [[word:shadazak|shadazak]] || [[word:kadazak|kadazak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazak|thadazak]] || [[word:jadazak|jadazak]] || [[word:shadazak|shadazak]] || [[word:kadazak|kadazak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadazak|shadazak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadazak|goshadazak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadazak|gokishadazak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadazaknĂŒ|shadazaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadazaknknĂŒ|goshadazaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazaknĂŒ|gokishadazaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadazakshĂ«|shadazakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadazaknkshĂ«|goshadazaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadazakshĂ«|gokishadazakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazakro|shadazakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazaknkro|goshadazaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazakro|gokishadazakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazakmu|shadazakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazaknkmu|goshadazaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazakmu|gokishadazakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadazaksher|shadazaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadazaknksher|goshadazaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadazaksher|gokishadazaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadazakng|shadazakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadazaknkng|goshadazaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadazakng|gokishadazakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadazakya|shadazakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadazaknkya|goshadazaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadazakya|gokishadazakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadazakyam|shadazakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadazaknkyam|goshadazaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadazakyam|gokishadazakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazaknĂŒshĂ«|shadazaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshadazaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishadazaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazaknĂŒro|shadazaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazaknknĂŒro|goshadazaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazaknĂŒro|gokishadazaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazaknĂŒmu|shadazaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazaknknĂŒmu|goshadazaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazaknĂŒmu|gokishadazaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazakshĂ«nĂŒ|shadazakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadazaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadazakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazakshĂ«ro|shadazakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazaknkshĂ«ro|goshadazaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazakshĂ«ro|gokishadazakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazakshĂ«mu|shadazakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazaknkshĂ«mu|goshadazaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazakshĂ«mu|gokishadazakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazakronĂŒ|shadazakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazaknkronĂŒ|goshadazaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazakronĂŒ|gokishadazakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazakroshĂ«|shadazakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazaknkroshĂ«|goshadazaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazakroshĂ«|gokishadazakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadazakromu|shadazakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadazaknkromu|goshadazaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadazakromu|gokishadazakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadazakmunĂŒ|shadazakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadazaknkmunĂŒ|goshadazaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadazakmunĂŒ|gokishadazakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadazakmushĂ«|shadazakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadazaknkmushĂ«|goshadazaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadazakmushĂ«|gokishadazakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadazakmuro|shadazakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadazaknkmuro|goshadazaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadazakmuro|gokishadazakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
